response:
Alex reads books.
Books hold stories.
Stories change minds.
Minds seek truth.
Truth needs time.
Time brings change.
Change alters views.
Views shift slowly.
Slowly builds wisdom.
Wisdom guides paths.
Paths lead far.
Far reaches new.
New ideas bloom.
Bloom in hearts.
Hearts feel deep.
Deep thoughts arise.
Arise from pages.
Pages count high.
High numbers grow.
Grow with days.
Days pass fast.
Fast reading helps.
Helps understand life.
Life holds love.
Love breaks rules.
Rules need testing.
Testing proves facts.
Facts show truth.
Truth is clear.
Clear minds think.
Think about math.
Math shows rates.
Rates equal speed.
Speed stays same.
